title.en: Are Argentina being treated favourably at World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在世界杯上是否得到了有利的待遇？

summary.en: Egypt have alleged bias in favour of Argentina and favouritism towards their star player, Lionel Messi. Is this fair?
summary.zh-CN: 埃及声称偏袒阿根廷，偏袒他们的明星球员莱昂内尔·梅西。这公平吗？

title.en: England players granted day off after Mexico win
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥获胜后英格兰球员获准休息一天

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel gave his players permission for an offsite family day on Tuesday as the squad recharged after their euphoric win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）周二允许他的球员参加场外家庭日，因为球队在对墨西哥的欣快胜利后重新充电。

title.en: A Golden Boot race for the ages - but who will come out on top?
title.zh-CN: 古往今来的金靴竞赛-但谁会登顶？

summary.en: It's fast becoming a World Cup Golden Boot for the ages. But who will win it?
summary.zh-CN: 它很快就成为了世界杯的金靴子。但谁会赢呢？

title.en: Man Utd agree deal for Chelsea's Santos
title.zh-CN: 曼联同意与切尔西的桑托斯达成协议

summary.en: Manchester United agree a £50m deal with Chelsea for their Brazilian midfielder Andrey Santos.
summary.zh-CN: 曼联同意与切尔西达成5000万英镑的合同，以换取他们的巴西中场安德烈·桑托斯。

title.en: Egypt want officials kicked out of World Cup
title.zh-CN: 埃及希望官员被踢出世界杯

summary.en: The Egyptian FA lodges a complaint with Fifa and demands an investigation into "double standards" of officiating in the controversial defeat by Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 埃及足协向国际足联提出投诉，并要求对阿根廷有争议的失败进行“双重标准”的调查。

title.en: Henderson has surgery in USA after breaking arm
title.zh-CN: 亨德森在手臂骨折后在美国接受手术

summary.en: Jordan Henderson has had surgery after breaking his arm during the celebrations of England's win over Mexico on Sunday.
summary.zh-CN: 乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）在周日英格兰队战胜墨西哥队的庆祝活动中胳膊骨折后接受了手术

title.en: Watch every penalty from Switzerland v Colombia shootout
title.zh-CN: 观看瑞士对哥伦比亚枪战的每一个点球

summary.en: Watch the full penalties as Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in the shootout to advance to the quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 观看完整的点球，因为瑞士队在枪战中以4比3击败哥伦比亚队，晋级四分之一决赛。

title.en: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 瑞士在罚球方面击败哥伦比亚，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 格雷戈尔·科贝尔（ Gregor Kobel ）是瑞士的点球英雄，他在哥伦比亚的库乔·埃尔南德斯（ Cucho Hernandez ）进行了一场令人惊叹的枪战，帮助与阿根廷进行了四分之一决赛。

title.en: A striker duel for the ages & Qatar revenge - what to expect in quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 为时已晚的前锋对决和卡塔尔的复仇-四分之一决赛中会发生什么

summary.en: Setting the scene for each of the four intriguing World Cup quarter-finals that begin on Thursday.
summary.zh-CN: 为周四开始的四场有趣的世界杯四分之一决赛中的每一场做好准备。

title.en: 'Gutted' Christie 'desperate' to help Scotland to more finals
title.zh-CN: 克里斯蒂“绝望”地帮助苏格兰进入更多决赛

summary.en: At 31, Bournemouth midfielder Ryan Christie is determined to help Scotland reach more major finals after his World Cup disappointment.
summary.zh-CN: 31岁的伯恩茅斯中场瑞恩·克里斯蒂（ Ryan Christie ）决心帮助苏格兰在世界杯失望之后进入更多重大决赛。

title.en: Meet the duo visiting all 16 World Cup venues in a London cab
title.zh-CN: 乘坐伦敦出租车参观所有16个世界杯场馆

summary.en: Meet Ollie Jenks and Seth Scott, who are attempting to visit all 16 World Cup stadiums in a traditional London taxi.
summary.zh-CN: 认识奥利·詹克斯（ Ollie Jenks ）和塞思·斯科特（ Seth Scott ） ，他们正试图乘坐传统的伦敦出租车参观所有16个世界杯体育场馆

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 31
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星31号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Benitez refuses to rule out Scotland interest - gossip
title.zh-CN: 贝尼特斯拒绝排除苏格兰的利益-八卦

summary.en: Rangers linked with midfielders in Norway and Serbia and would former Liverpool and Real Madrid manager be interested in Scotland job?
summary.zh-CN: 流浪者与挪威和塞尔维亚的中场球员有联系，前利物浦和皇家马德里经理对苏格兰的工作感兴趣吗？

title.en: Superstars, politics & hydration breaks: Themes of the World Cup so far
title.zh-CN: 超级明星、政治和补水休息：迄今为止世界杯的主题

summary.en: A rest day at the World Cup provides the opportunity to take stock of how the biggest-ever edition has gone so far.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯的休息日提供了一个机会，可以评估有史以来最大的版本迄今为止的进展情况。

title.en: England's right-back crisis continues - what are the options vs Norway?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰的右后卫危机仍在继续-与挪威相比，有哪些选择？

summary.en: England’s defensive defiance in Mexico City was magnificent. But next comes the reality check: Norway in Miami with a patched-up back-line.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰在墨西哥城的防守反抗是壮观的。但接下来是现实检查：挪威在迈阿密，后线已修补。

title.en: Argentina make incredible late comeback to beat Egypt

summary.en: Argentina survive an almighty scare before delivering a scarcely believable second-half comeback to break Egypt hearts and reach the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: VAR controversially rules out Egypt goal

summary.en: Mostafa Zico has his goal for Egypt ruled out following a VAR review, for a foul on Lisandro Martinez in the build up, during their World Cup last 16 match in Atlanta.

title.en: Fernandez header seals dramatic Argentina comeback

summary.en: Enzo Fernandez scores late to give Argentina the lead against Egypt in their last 16 match at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Messi rescues Argentina with equaliser against Egypt

summary.en: Lionel Messi scores a late equaliser for Argentina against Egypt to level the game at 2-2 during their match in Atlanta.

title.en: Rogers is Arsenal's main target - Wednesday's gossip

summary.en: Arsenal make Morgan Rogers their main target, Liverpool interested in Mexico teenager and Everton eye England defender Spence.

title.en: Messi denied from penalty spot by 'brilliant' Shobeir save

summary.en: Lionel Messi misses his second penalty of the 2026 World Cup, as his effort is saved by Egypt's Mostafa Shobeir in Atlanta.

title.en: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain

summary.en: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.

title.en: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal

summary.en: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all...

title.en: Tears of relief? Messi adds another incredible chapter to World Cup career

summary.en: Argentina great Lionel Messi sheds tears as they fight back to beat Egypt and reach the World Cup quarter-finals.
